name: code_exec
description: Run agent-authored Python in a hardened, ephemeral Docker sandbox (sc-codeexec image) so the deep-pentest agent can operate the target product end to end (drive documented multi-step flows via REST/SDK, capture object ids, plant OOB canaries) and abuse the resulting state. Scope-enforced via the sc helper; created resources ledgered for cleanup. retryCount 0: re-running side-effecting code would duplicate created resources.
